name: Pratik Heshi Photography & Films
address: Island society, Datta Mandir Rd, Wakad, Pune, Maharashtra 411057
full_address: Island society, Datta Mandir Rd, Wakad, Pune, Maharashtra 411057

reviews.text:
I got our photos and videos and I love them so much. You and your team did an amazing job. All of guests commented on what a lovely photographer you were and we got so many compliments about yourself.

You made Paresh and I feel so comfortable on the day and we really appreciate it. You really captured the most magical moments on the day without us even knowing it.

Our album arrived, it is absolutely stunning!! We are so grateful for everything you did for us on the day, and how everything just went so smoothly and nothing was too much trouble!

There are so many natural & candid shots which is what we really wanted. Our guests love their photos too.
I just want to say THANK YOU SO MUCH for our amazing wedding photos!! 😊

I got our photos and videos and I love them so much. You and your team did an amazing job. All of guests commented on what a lovely photographer you were and we got so many compliments about yourself.

There are so many natural & candid shots which is what we really wanted. Our guests love their photos too.
I just want to say THANK YOU SO MUCH for our amazing wedding photos!! 😊

We had really nice experience with Pratik for our wedding photography .
Everyone is well aware about his photography skills but would like to highlight about his on time delivery. He is very keen about on time delivery either it's photos or videos.
He literally gave me few selected photos just after my wedding which was very impressive.
He was very flexible in terms of tailoring package .. We opted for cinematic videography instead of traditional videography . He agreed to the requirement and then we completely relied on him and his team . Rest is the best memories we had with best quality photographs and cinematic videography

Positive: Professionalism, Quality, Responsiveness, and Value for money are few to list down

The pictures are mesmerizing! Amazing work done by Pratik Heshi and team. The experience for the pre-wedding shoot is too good. From the start of the shoot till the delivery, Pratik and his team had been very co-operative and understanding. Thank you for making these once in a lifetime moments so special for us and capturing every moment so perfectly. The entire team makes the environment very fun loving. Couldn't have asked for a better experience. Thank you so much.

If you want the best photographer in affordable budget then you should definitely call Pratik to shoot your function. I can guarantee you that after seeing his skills and photos you will not be disappointed. He is a heart winning Photographer for sure. He shot all our functions in detail.
Thanks a lot Pratik for making sure all the ceremonies were captured so well and it became a life time memory for us.

Thanks again. Cheers !!

Our pre wedding photoshoot was super awesome. At very last moment we asked pratik for miniature photography, he agreed for that and the result was so beautiful.

For pratik photography goes much more beyond good quality images.. he enjoys capturing the moments as much as we as a new couple enjoys being together 😜.

Sharing my favorite miniature picture with you. Thank you pratik for all you efforts and hard work.

We are glad that we chose Pratik for our Pre wedding and reception photography. We felt at complete ease as they made the whole experience so beautiful and magical. He along with his creative team members were very friendly and they also knew a lot of scenic places to capture the moments. I would highly recommend him for anyone who is looking for a very talented wedding photographer.

He along with his creative team members were very friendly and they also knew a lot of scenic places to capture the moments. I would highly recommend him for anyone who is looking for a very talented wedding photographer.

Pratik is very creative and professional. I really liked his ideas for my pre-wedding shoot. He knows exactly when to capture a beautiful moment. He also made a good use of natural scenic locations for our shoot which turned out extremely beautiful. Definitely recommended. Keep up with the great work, Pratik! Lots of success to you.

Pratik is very professional and he knows his strength. Best in candid photography.
We did half day photo shoot for our pre-wedding and we got the best pictures of our life.. no editing is required when Pratik clicks the pics... It's so natural pics and it made us look beautiful. Thanks pratik keep it up.
